description: Create a search grid centered on 37.7436°N, 119.5919°W in Yosemite Valley. In a folder named 'SAR_MarcusChen_Search', create a 2km x 2km semi-transparent polygon named 'Search_Boundary', two divider paths ('Divider_NS' and 'Divider_EW') splitting it into quadrants, and sector placemarks ('Sector_A_NW', 'Sector_B_NE', 'Sector_C_SW', 'Sector_D_SE') at each quadrant center. Include a placemark named 'LKP_MarcusChen' at the coordinates and export the folder to /home/ga/Documents/SAR_MarcusChen_Grid.kml.
